   в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қв•ҡв•җв•қ  в•ҡв•җв•қв•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қв•ҡв•җв•қв•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қв•ҡв•җв•қ  в•ҡв•җв•қ
  
  Keep your AI agent configs in sync вҖ” automatically.
  Works across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and GitHub Copilot.

  How it works:

  1. Connect    Link your LLM provider and select your agents
  2. Setup      Detect stack, install sync hooks & skills
  3. Generate   Audit existing config or generate from scratch
  4. Finalize   Review changes and score your setup

  Step 1/3 вҖ” Connect

  Provider: claude-cli | Model: claude-opus-4-7[1m] | Scan: claude-haiku-4-5@20251001

  Target: claude, cursor, github-copilot

  Step 2/4 вҖ” Setup

  Installing sync infrastructure...

  вң“ Pre-commit hook installed вҖ” configs sync on every commit
  вң“ Onboarding hook вҖ” nudges new team members to set up
  вң“ Freshness hook вҖ” warns when configs are stale
  вң“ Agent skills installed вҖ” /setup-caliber, /find-skills, /save-learning
  вң“ Session learning enabled

  New team members can run /setup-caliber inside their coding agent
  (Claude Code or Cursor) to get set up automatically.

  Current config score:

  29/100 (Grade F)  В·  Claude Code + Cursor + github-copilot  В·  в–“в–“в–“в–“в–“в–“в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘
  вң— CLAUDE.md exists
  вң— Claude rules exist (.claude/rules/)
  вң— Cursor rules exist
  вң— Copilot instructions exist
  вң— Cursor .mdc rules

  Run /Users/alonpe/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin/caliber score for details. (+14 more)


  Step 3/4 вҖ” Generate

  Using claude-opus-4-7[1m] for docs, claude-haiku-4-5@20251001 for skills
